zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Grey於大約1222年1月4日出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯時，他的父親Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield38歲，母親Beatrix St Luce33歲。他和Isabel Dunston至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1267年1月5日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾索莫頓享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Grey was born about 4 January 1222, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, was 38 and his mother, Beatrix St Luce, was 33. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Isabel Dunston. He died on 5 January 1267, in Somerton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Grey est né environ 4 janvier 1222, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Beatrix St Luce, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Isabel Dunston. Il est décédé le 5 janvier 1267, à Somerton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Grey um 4. Januar 1222 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield 38 und seine Mutter Beatrix St Luce 33. Er hatte mit Isabel Dunston mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Januar 1267 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Somerton, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Isabel Dunston. Morì il 5 gennaio 1267, nel Somerton, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Greyが約1222年1月4日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfieldは38歳，母Beatrix St Luceは33歳であった。彼はIsabel Dunstonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1267年1月5日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアソマートンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Grey(이)가 대략 1222년 1월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix St Luce(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Isabel Dunston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 1월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 서머턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Grey родился около 4 января 1222 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert de Grey of Rotherfield было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix St Luce, 33. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Isabel Dunston. Он умер 5 января 1267 г. в местности сомиртон, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
